fields.name: Text
fields.fieldText:
Student Timetable submitted successfully!

This will now be reviewed and verified by your Blue Arrow Consultant.

fields.name: Text_0
fields.fieldText: You are not currently configured as an international student so cannot submit Study Timetables.

screens.description: Please provide your student term timetable details.
screens.name: Student_Term_Timetable
screens.label: Student Term Timetable

fields.name: Student_Timetable_Summary_Text
fields.fieldText:
Student Study Timetable

As a student who has limited permission to work during term-times, we are legally bound to hold details of your academic terms/vacations covering the duration of your period of study in the UK for which you will be employed.

On the next screen, you will be asked to upload evidence of your course enrolment and study timetable/vacation dates.

fields.name: CourseDetails
fields.fieldText:
Course Details

Let’s start with capturing some of your enrolled course information.

fields.name: Course_Start_Date
fields.fieldText: What is your course Start Date?

fields.name: What_is_the_name_of_your_education_provider
fields.fieldText: Who is your education provider?

fields.name: Course_End_Date
fields.fieldText: What is the expected end date of your course?

validationRule.errorMessage: Course end date must be after course start date

fields.name: Student_Work_Hours
fields.fieldText: What is the maximum number of hours you are permitted to work during term time?

fields.name: Have_you_finished_your_studies2
fields.fieldText: Have you completed all study commitments and have no vacation dates to record?

fields.name: TermDates
fields.fieldText:
Vacation Dates

Now let’s capture information on when you will be on vacation from your studies.

fields.name: Vacation_1_Start_Date
fields.fieldText: What is the start date of your current, or next, vacation?

validationRule.errorMessage: Vacation 1 Start Date must be greater than the Course Start Date and less than Course End Date

fields.name: Vacation_1_End_Date
fields.fieldText: What is the end date of your current, or next, vacation?

validationRule.errorMessage: Vacation 1 End Date must be greater than Vacation 1 Start Date and less than Course End Date. This must also be greater than today's date.

fields.name: Vacation_2_Start_Date
fields.fieldText: What will the start date of the following vacation be?

validationRule.errorMessage: Vacation 2 Start Date must be greater than Vacation 1 End Date and less than Course End Date

fields.name: Vacation_2_End_Date
fields.fieldText: What will the end date of the following vacation be?

validationRule.errorMessage: Vacation 2 End Date must be greater than Vacation 2 Start Date and less than Course End Date

screens.description: Please provide your student term timetable details.
screens.name: Student_Term_Timetable_0
screens.label: Student Term Timetable

fields.name: Student_Timetable_Summary_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Student Study Timetable

As a student who has limited permission to work during term-times, we are legally bound to hold details of your academic terms/vacations covering the duration of your period of study in the UK for which you will be employed.

On the next screen, you will be asked to upload evidence of your course enrolment and study timetable/vacation

dates

fields.name: CourseDetails_0
fields.fieldText:
Course Details

These are your current course details we have in the system:


Course Start Time: {!Get_Current.IP_TimetableStartDate__c}

Course End Date: {!Get_Current.IP_TimetableEndDate__c}

Education Provider: {!Get_Current.IP_EducationProvider__c}

Work Hour Restriction: {!Get_Current.Student_Work_Hours__c}

fields.name: TermDates_0
fields.fieldText:
Vacation Dates

These are your current vacation dates we have in the system:


Vacation 1 Start Date: {!Get_Current.Term_Vacation_1_Start_Date__c}

Vacation 1 End Date:{!Get_Current.Term_Vacation_1_End_Date__c}

Vacation 2 Start Date: {!Get_Current.Term_Vacation_2_Start_Date__c}

Vacation 2 End Date:{!Get_Current.Term_Vacation_2_End_Date__c}

screens.description: Please provide your student term timetable details.
screens.name: Student_Term_Timetable_0_0_0
screens.label: Student Term Timetable

fields.name: Enrollment2
fields.fieldText:
Enrollment Letter

Please now upload a document clearly showing your enrolment into the course you are studying with your educational establishment. This can be a CAS letter or a letter from your education establishment student records department.

fields.name: BA_Privacy_policy
fields.fieldText: For further details on how we use and store your data please review our privacy notice.

fields.name: Student_Timetable_Summary_Text_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Student Study Timetable

Please now upload a document clearly showing your term/vacation dates. This can be a copy you receive from your educational establishment or a screenshot/copy directly from your educational establishment website.

fields.name: BA_Privacy_policy1
fields.fieldText: For further details on how we use and store your data please review our privacy notice.

fields.name: CompleteText
fields.fieldText:
Study Complete Evidence

If you have now completed your studies and have no further learning commitments, please upload a letter from your educational establishment confirming this.

fields.name: BA_Privacy_policy2
fields.fieldText: For further details on how we use and store your data please review our privacy notice.
